$comment: release-type=python drives version bumps in pyproject.toml. The json/yaml extra-files updaters bump the `version` field in the TypeScript package.json (which build.ts injects into the binary) and the plugin.yaml manifest via JSONPath, keeping all three in lock-step with the release WITHOUT requiring an x-release-please-version marker (the generic updater needs a marker; the json/yaml updaters target the field directly).
